prompt:
Goal: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical soda advertisement poster for Sprite, full of freshness, motion, splashing water, citrus, and tropical energy.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high-resolution luxury commercial photography style, bright daylight, saturated greens and aquas, dramatic wide-angle perspective.

Layout: Place huge bold white distressed uppercase headline text in the upper left reading FRESH BURST, stacked on two lines. Beneath it add a small all-caps tagline reading MORE THAN REFRESHING. IT'S A VIBE.. Under the tagline place the white italic Sprite logo with a small yellow-green sparkle icon. The center-right foreground is dominated by one oversized plastic soda bottle angled diagonally toward the viewer, held in the woman's right hand, with a green cap and green label. The center-left foreground shows one young woman jumping or floating midair, wearing a lime-green fitted sporty crop top, white denim shorts, and white sneakers; her hair is tied in a messy bun with loose strands. Cover her face with one plain tan rectangular censor block matching the generated image. Use transparent eyeglasses partially visible around the blocked face.

Subject details: The woman has a cheerful energetic pose, knees bent as if leaping, torso leaning back slightly, one arm extended toward the camera holding the bottle. The bottle label prominently reads Sprite with smaller visible text “LEMON-LIME”; show clear carbonated liquid, bubbles, condensation, and floating lime slices inside and around the bottle. Make the bottle extremely crisp and glossy, larger than life, occupying much of the right half of the poster.

Environment: A lush fantasy tropical waterfall canyon with turquoise water below, mossy cliffs, dense green foliage, sunbeams, mist, sparkling droplets, and a dreamy resort-like terrace in the lower right with small round tables and umbrellas. Surround the woman and bottle with a circular burst of splashing water, airborne leaves, bubbles, and lime wedges. Include bright backlighting from the upper right and a sparkling sky-blue background.

Counted visible elements to preserve: 1 woman, 1 oversized soda bottle, 1 face-covering rectangular block, 4 main text elements: “FRESH BURST”, “MORE THAN REFRESHING. IT'S A VIBE.”, the left Sprite logo, and the bottle Sprite logo. Include many small bubbles, droplets, leaves, and lime slices as atmospheric particles, but do not add extra brand slogans.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic commercial beverage photography blended with cinematic fantasy advertising, ultra-detailed condensation, high-speed splash photography, glossy product lighting, vibrant green-and-cyan palette, shallow depth of field, dynamic motion, polished premium ad finish.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and in English, avoid extra logos beyond the two Sprite marks, do not add watermark or borders, preserve the censored face block, and make the product the sharpest focal point.
